name: Bilt Blue Card
effective_cost: Free — $0 annual fee every year, with no spending requirement to waive it

verdict.text: The only $0-fee card earning points on rent, with no transaction fee

earn_rates.category: Hotels — booked on the Bilt Travel Portal
Flights — booked on the Bilt Travel Portal
Lyft — after linking Bilt and Lyft accounts

earn_note: *Housing Rewards isn't a flat rate — it scales with your everyday spend: selecting 'Housing-only rewards' earns up to 1.25x on rent or mortgage, based on how much of that payment your card spend covers in the same billing cycle (25% of the payment = 0.5x, 100%+ = 1.25x; below 25% still earns a flat 250 points). Terms and conditions apply. There's no 5-transaction monthly minimum, unlike the original Bilt Card. The restaurant bonus varies by location and is shown in the Bilt app at checkout — up to 4x is the ceiling, not a flat rate. New cardholders get $100 in Bilt Cash on account opening, with no spending requirement.

redemption_options.method: Transfer to airline/hotel partners (19 airlines, 7 hotels, mostly 1:1)
Book travel directly through the Bilt Travel Portal
Statement credit, rent/mortgage credit, or Lyft rides

points.note: The Points Guy values Bilt Points at 2.2¢ each — among the highest of any bank currency — but that ceiling only applies to well-chosen airline/hotel transfers. Cash-equivalent redemptions (statement credit, rent credit) are a flat 1¢/point.

transfer_partners.highlight: 19 airline and 7 hotel partners, almost all at 1:1 (Accor Live Limitless is 3:2) — Hyatt, Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Wyndham, and I Prefer on the hotel side; United, Air France/KLM, Emirates, Cathay Pacific, and Southwest among the airlines.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: Wyndham Rewards and I Prefer Hotel Rewards (Preferred Hotels & Resorts, 700+ independent properties) were both added as transfer partners in 2026.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported — standard Mastercard protection
MasterRental coverage applies first, before your personal auto insurance — no personal claim needed. Exact per-rental and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Purchase Assurance is a confirmed benefit; exact per-item and annual dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Cellular Wireless Telephone Protection is a confirmed benefit for phones on a bill paid with this card; exact deductible and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Not included on the Blue Card — this benefit starts at the Obsidian tier
Not included on the Blue Card — this benefit starts at the Obsidian tier

protection_note: A real primary rental CDW and confirmed purchase/cell-phone protections for a $0-fee card, but no trip cancellation, trip delay, or extended warranty coverage — those start at Obsidian.
rental_note: MasterRental coverage applies first, ahead of your personal auto policy — decline the counter's CDW and pay with this card. Exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits.

services.name: No transaction fee on rent, mortgage, and HOA payments
services.detail: Pay housing costs through Bilt with no card-processing fee, even if your landlord's portal normally charges one — funds are debited from a linked bank account within 24 hours, not your credit line.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: 10% intro APR
services.detail: 10% on new eligible purchases for the first 12 billing cycles, then a variable 26.74%–34.74% APR applies.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add and manage in the Bilt app
Earns Bilt Points on their spend (into your account)
No separate rewards or Bilt Cash of their own

additional_cards.note: Free on the Blue Card — the $50/$95 Authorized User fee only kicks in on the Obsidian and Palladium tiers.

timeline.text: Bilt Card 2.0 launches as a three-tier lineup (Blue/Obsidian/Palladium), replacing the original single Bilt Mastercard and removing its 5-transaction-per-month requirement to earn on rent.
